name: Din Tai Fung
cuisine: Taiwanese · Xiao Long Bao · Dim Sum
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 小籠包 · 點心

menu.name: Xiao Long Bao (10 pcs)
menu.desc: Steamed pork soup dumplings, the original

menu.name: Steamed Shrimp & Pork Fried Rice
menu.desc: Wok-tossed with egg and scallion

menu.name: Sautéed Spinach with Garlic
menu.desc: Fresh spinach, garlic oil, house seasoning

menu.name: Spicy Dumpling in Chili Sauce (6 pcs)
menu.desc: Silky dumpling skin, numbing chili sauce

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Worth every minute of the queue. The soup dumplings are perfect — thin skin, rich broth, the real deal.

reviews.name: Hiroshi K.
reviews.text: Classic for a reason. The fried rice is underrated. Came twice in three days.

reviews.name: Léa B.
reviews.text: Exceptional food. Touristy but deserves the reputation. Go early to avoid the wait.

name: Shin Yeh Taiwanese Cuisine
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 傳統菜餚 · 合菜
mrt: Taipei City Hall · Exit 3 · 5 min walk

menu.name: Three-Cup Chicken
menu.desc: Sesame oil, soy, rice wine — a Taiwanese classic

menu.name: Steamed Sea Bass
menu.desc: Whole fish, ginger, scallion, soy drizzle

menu.name: Stir-Fried Water Spinach
menu.desc: Garlic, fermented tofu, high heat

menu.name: Braised Pork Rice
menu.desc: Slow-cooked pork belly, pickled radish, soft egg

reviews.name: Wei C.
reviews.text: The best traditional Taiwanese cooking in Xinyi. Three-cup chicken is superb. Great for family dinners.

reviews.name: Alice R.
reviews.text: Excellent introduction to classic Taiwanese cuisine. Staff are helpful with the menu. Everything was delicious.

name: Wang Steak
cuisine_zh: 西餐 · 牛排 · 精緻休閒
address: 88 Zhongxiao E Rd, Sec 5, Xinyi, Taipei
mrt: Taipei City Hall · Exit 4 · 3 min walk

menu.name: Prime Rib Eye (280g)
menu.desc: USDA prime, grilled to order, house herb butter

menu.name: Caesar Salad
menu.desc: Romaine, house dressing, parmesan, croutons

menu.name: Garlic Baguette
menu.desc: Toasted, parsley butter, served warm

menu.name: Crème Brûlée
menu.desc: Classic French dessert, torched tableside

reviews.name: Thomas L.
reviews.text: Reliable quality and great value for a steak dinner in Taipei. The rib eye is consistently good.

reviews.name: Mei L.
reviews.text: My go-to for business dinners. Attentive service, great ambience, and the steaks are always perfect.

name: Sushiro
cuisine_zh: 日本料理 · 迴轉壽司 · 平價
mrt: Taipei City Hall · Exit 2 · 8 min walk

menu.name: Salmon Nigiri (2 pcs)
menu.desc: Fresh Atlantic salmon, seasoned rice

menu.name: Prawn Tempura Roll
menu.desc: Crispy tempura, cucumber, avocado

menu.name: Tuna Sashimi (3 pcs)
menu.desc: Lean tuna, wasabi, pickled ginger

menu.name: Tamago Nigiri
menu.desc: Sweet rolled egg, seasoned sushi rice

reviews.name: Kenji T.
reviews.text: Great quality for a conveyor belt chain. Always fresh and affordable. Kids love it.

reviews.name: Rachel H.
reviews.text: Best value sushi in Taipei. Queue can be long on weekends but moves fast. Worth every NT dollar.

name: Le Midi Bistro
cuisine_zh: 法式料理 · 歐式 · 精緻

menu.name: Duck Confit
menu.desc: Slow-cooked duck leg, lentils, red wine jus

menu.name: Pan-Seared Sea Bass
menu.desc: Crispy skin, beurre blanc, seasonal veg

menu.name: Niçoise Salad
menu.desc: Tuna, green beans, olives, soft-boiled egg

menu.name: Chocolate Fondant
menu.desc: Warm dark chocolate, vanilla bean ice cream

reviews.name: Claire D.
reviews.text: Wonderful French cooking in Taipei. The duck confit is authentic. Surprised me completely.

reviews.name: James W.
reviews.text: One of the best dinners I had in Taipei. Quiet atmosphere, attentive service, excellent wine list.

name: Yongkang Beef Noodle
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 牛肉麵 · 紅燒

menu.name: Braised Beef Noodle Soup
menu.desc: Slow-cooked brisket, hand-cut noodles, rich spiced broth

menu.name: Spicy Beef Tendon Noodles
menu.desc: Mala-spiced tendon, chewy noodles, chili oil

menu.name: Steamed Pork Dumplings (6 pcs)
menu.desc: Thin skin, juicy filling

menu.name: Pickled Mustard Greens
menu.desc: House-fermented, tangy side

reviews.name: Thomas W.
reviews.text: Best beef noodles I've had in Taiwan. The broth is deep and complex. No frills, just exceptional food.

reviews.name: Chen Li.
reviews.text: My family has been coming here for 20 years. Still the best.

reviews.name: Rina M.
reviews.text: Very popular at lunch, queue outside. The spicy tendon noodles are incredible.

name: Mume
cuisine_zh: 現代歐式 · 當季食材 · 精緻料理
mrt: Xinyi Anhe Station · Exit 2 · 6 min walk

menu.name: Seasonal Tasting Menu (6 courses)
menu.desc: Chef's market-driven selection, changes weekly

menu.name: Burrata with Fermented Tomato
menu.desc: House burrata, fermented cherry tomato, olive oil

menu.name: Grilled Local Fish
menu.desc: Whole fish, seasonal herbs, citrus butter

menu.name: Miso Caramel Dessert
menu.desc: Miso ice cream, caramel, sesame tuile

reviews.name: Olivia S.
reviews.text: One of the best meals of my life. The tasting menu is creative, elegant, and genuinely delicious. Book weeks ahead.

reviews.name: Kai W.
reviews.text: Top-tier cooking in a beautiful setting. They take local ingredients seriously. Outstanding wine list too.

reviews.name: Isabella M.
reviews.text: Exceptional. The fermented tomato dish alone is worth the visit. Taipei's best fine dining.

name: Smoothie House
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 新鮮水果 · 剉冰

menu.name: Mango Shaved Ice
menu.desc: Fresh Irwin mango, shaved milk ice, mango sorbet

menu.name: Strawberry Fruit Plate
menu.desc: Fresh strawberries, condensed milk, seasonal fruits

menu.name: Mixed Berry Smoothie
menu.desc: Blended fresh berries, yogurt, honey

menu.name: Mango Smoothie
menu.desc: 100% fresh Taiwanese mango, no sugar added

reviews.name: Zoe C.
reviews.text: The mango shaved ice is extraordinary. Only possible in Taiwan with these mangoes. Go in summer.

reviews.name: Wei L.
reviews.text: Yongkang Street institution. The fruit quality is always perfect. Best dessert stop after Din Tai Fung nearby.

name: Xiaolongkan Hot Pot
cuisine_zh: 四川料理 · 火鍋 · 麻辣 · 共享
address: 270 Fuxing S Rd, Sec 1, Da'an, Taipei

menu.name: Mala Spicy Broth (per person)
menu.desc: Sichuan peppercorn, dried chili, numbing heat

menu.name: Premium Wagyu Beef Slices
menu.desc: Thinly sliced, cooks in seconds, melt-in-mouth

menu.name: Fresh Prawn Platter
menu.desc: Head-on tiger prawns, served raw for the pot

menu.name: Vegetable & Tofu Set
menu.desc: Napa cabbage, silken tofu, enoki, lotus root

menu.name: Hand-Made Noodles
menu.desc: Thick wheat noodles to finish your broth

reviews.name: Jake R.
reviews.text: The mala broth is perfectly numbing — not just hot, actually complex. Great quality meat. A perfect group dinner.

reviews.name: Wei C.
reviews.text: One of the best hot pot chains in Taipei. Ingredients are always fresh. The sauce bar is incredible.

reviews.name: Sofia M.
reviews.text: Never had hot pot before — now obsessed. Staff were helpful explaining what to order.

name: Chun Shui Tang
cuisine: Bubble Tea · Taiwanese Café · The Originator
cuisine_zh: 珍珠奶茶 · 台式咖啡廳 · 創始店
address: 168 Fuxing S Rd, Sec 2, Da'an, Taipei

menu.name: Original Pearl Milk Tea
menu.desc: The recipe that started it all — black tea, milk, tapioca

menu.name: Taro Ball Grass Jelly
menu.desc: Purple taro balls, grass jelly, brown sugar syrup

menu.name: Shrimp Wonton Soup
menu.desc: House-made wontons, clear pork broth, scallion

menu.name: Taiwanese Bento Set
menu.desc: Rice, braised pork, pickled veg, soft egg

reviews.name: Clara B.
reviews.text: The birthplace of bubble tea! You have to come here. The original pearl milk tea is perfectly balanced.

reviews.name: Alex T.
reviews.text: Historical and delicious. The food menu is underrated — the wonton soup is excellent.

name: Da'an Kaffe
cuisine_zh: 咖啡廳 · 早午餐 · 精品咖啡

menu.name: Single Origin Pour Over
menu.desc: Ethiopian or Colombian, seasonal rotation

menu.name: Avocado Toast
menu.desc: Sourdough, smashed avocado, poached egg, chili flakes

menu.name: Butter Croissant
menu.desc: Freshly baked, laminated pastry, house jam

menu.name: Banana Walnut Waffle
menu.desc: Belgian waffle, fresh banana, walnut, maple syrup

reviews.name: Emma T.
reviews.text: Hidden gem on a quiet street in Da'an. The best pour-over in the neighbourhood. Avocado toast is perfect.

reviews.name: Yuki H.
reviews.text: Lovely little café, good coffee, great atmosphere. Gets busy on weekend mornings.

name: Tiger Sugar
cuisine_zh: 珍珠奶茶 · 黑糖 · 波霸
address: 17 Zhongshan N Rd, Sec 2, Zhongshan, Taipei

menu.name: Brown Sugar Boba Milk (Tiger Series)
menu.desc: Signature tiger-stripe cup, fresh milk, chewy tapioca

menu.name: Brown Sugar Matcha Latte
menu.desc: Ceremonial grade matcha, tiger caramel, boba

menu.name: Taro Milk Tea with Boba
menu.desc: Creamy taro, house milk tea, large tapioca

menu.name: Fresh Milk with Pudding
menu.desc: House-set egg pudding, fresh Taiwanese milk

reviews.name: Emma P.
reviews.text: The brown sugar boba is genuinely different from everywhere else. Richer, more caramel-forward. Worth the hype.

reviews.name: David C.
reviews.text: Queued for 15 mins and zero regrets. Best boba I've had in Asia.

reviews.name: Nadia F.
reviews.text: Very sweet but very good. The tiger stripes are beautiful. Great for Instagram too!

name: Addiction Aquatic Development
cuisine_zh: 海鮮市場 · 生魚片 · 日式料理
address: 18 Zhongshan N Rd, Sec 6, Zhongshan, Taipei

menu.name: Daily Sashimi Set
menu.desc: Chef's selection of seasonal fresh fish, wasabi, soy

menu.name: Grilled Lobster
menu.desc: Half lobster, garlic butter, charcoal grilled

menu.name: Premium Salmon Sashimi (8 pcs)
menu.desc: Atlantic salmon, just cut, served on ice

menu.name: Boiled Tiger Prawns
menu.desc: Fresh, sweet, served with ponzu dipping sauce

reviews.name: Grace H.
reviews.text: The freshest seafood in Taipei. It's a market and a restaurant — you pick what you want and they prepare it.

reviews.name: François D.
reviews.text: As good as any Tokyo fish market. The sashimi is outstanding. Worth the trip.

name: RAW
cuisine_zh: 現代台灣料理 · 當季食材 · 米其林
mrt: Jiannan Rd Station · Exit 2 · 8 min walk

menu.name: Seasonal Tasting Menu (8 courses)
menu.desc: André Chiang's vision of modern Taiwanese cuisine

menu.name: Wine Pairing (per person)
menu.desc: Sommelier-selected wines to match each course

menu.name: Tea Pairing
menu.desc: Curated Taiwanese high mountain teas

reviews.name: Maxime L.
reviews.text: One of the top ten meals of my life. RAW redefines what Taiwanese cuisine can be. Book 4–6 weeks ahead.

reviews.name: Julia W.
reviews.text: Michelin quality through and through. Each course is a work of art. The tea pairing is extraordinary.

reviews.name: Ren Y.
reviews.text: The best restaurant in Taipei, full stop. Impeccable service, creative food, beautiful space.

name: Nishiki Ramen
cuisine_zh: 日本料理 · 拉麵 · 豚骨

menu.name: Tonkotsu Ramen
menu.desc: 12-hour pork bone broth, thin noodles, chashu, soft egg

menu.name: Spicy Miso Ramen
menu.desc: Miso-infused broth, ground pork, bamboo shoots

menu.name: Gyoza (6 pcs)
menu.desc: Pan-fried pork and cabbage dumplings

menu.name: Chashu Pork Rice
menu.desc: Slow-braised pork, seasoned rice, pickled ginger

reviews.name: Yoshi M.
reviews.text: Rivals the best ramen shops in Tokyo. The tonkotsu broth is rich and not too heavy. Always packed at lunch.

reviews.name: Ben K.
reviews.text: Best ramen I've had in Taipei. The soft egg is perfectly runny. I came back three times in a week.

name: Kumamoto Izakaya
cuisine_zh: 日本料理 · 居酒屋 · 啤酒 · 小菜

menu.name: Chicken Yakitori Skewers (4 pcs)
menu.desc: Grilled thigh, tare glaze, scallion

menu.name: Draft Sapporo Beer
menu.desc: Cold pour, served in frosted glass

menu.name: Takoyaki (6 pcs)
menu.desc: Octopus balls, bonito flakes, mayo, okonomiyaki sauce

menu.name: Mixed Sashimi Plate
menu.desc: Chef's daily selection, served with shiso leaf

reviews.name: Sho T.
reviews.text: Feels like an actual Tokyo izakaya. Great spot for after-work drinks and food. The yakitori is excellent.

reviews.name: Mike L.
reviews.text: Lively atmosphere, good beer, tasty small plates. Perfect for a group dinner that goes late.

name: Ningxia Night Market
cuisine_zh: 街頭小吃 · 蚵仔麵線 · 台灣料理

menu.name: Oyster Vermicelli (蚵仔麵線)
menu.desc: Thick vermicelli, oysters, sweet potato starch broth

menu.name: Deep-Fried Taro Ball
menu.desc: Crispy outside, soft taro inside

menu.name: Peanut Ice Cream Roll
menu.desc: Shaved ice, peanut brittle, coriander, ice cream

menu.name: Grilled Corn on the Cob
menu.desc: Charcoal grilled, soy glaze

reviews.name: Anna T.
reviews.text: The most authentic night market in Taipei — locals, not tourists. Oyster vermicelli is a must.

reviews.name: James L.
reviews.text: Go hungry. Everything is cheap and delicious. The peanut ice cream roll is life-changing.

reviews.name: Yuki S.
reviews.text: Very lively, very local. Busy on weekends but worth it. Exactly what street food should be.

name: Jianguo Beef Noodle
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 牛肉麵 · 老派
address: 12 Yanping N Rd, Sec 2, Datong, Taipei

menu.name: Red-Braised Beef Noodle
menu.desc: Traditional spiced broth, tender brisket, thick noodles

menu.name: Beef Tendon Noodle
menu.desc: Slow-cooked tendon, gelatinous and rich

menu.name: Pickled Cabbage Side
menu.desc: House fermented, crunchy, refreshing

menu.name: Braised Pork Rice
menu.desc: Classic minced pork, soy-glazed, over steamed rice

reviews.name: Lin H.
reviews.text: This place has been here since I was a kid. Same recipe, same quality. The real Taipei beef noodle.

reviews.name: Peter S.
reviews.text: Found this by walking around Datong. Rich, hearty soup. Great value and absolutely no tourists.

name: Ah Mei Soy Milk
cuisine: Taiwanese Breakfast · Soy Milk · You Tiao
cuisine_zh: 台式早餐 · 豆漿 · 油條

menu.name: Warm Soy Milk
menu.desc: Stone-ground fresh soybeans, slightly sweet

menu.name: You Tiao (Fried Dough Stick)
menu.desc: Light, airy, crispy — perfect for dipping

menu.name: Scallion Egg Pancake (蛋餅)
menu.desc: Thin crepe, egg, scallion, soy dipping sauce

menu.name: Shaobing (Sesame Flatbread)
menu.desc: Flaky layered bread, sesame topping, warm from oven

reviews.name: Wang F.
reviews.text: Breakfast here every Sunday. The soy milk is perfectly sweet and warm. Queue is part of the ritual.

reviews.name: Nadine R.
reviews.text: A true Taipei morning experience. The you tiao dipped in warm soy milk — nothing else like it.

name: Dihua Street Tea Room
cuisine_zh: 台灣茶 · 傳統點心 · 老街文化

menu.name: Alishan High Mountain Oolong
menu.desc: Cold-brewed overnight, floral, smooth, 100% Taiwanese leaf

menu.name: Red Bean Tang Yuan
menu.desc: Glutinous rice balls, sweet red bean filling, warm broth

menu.name: Pineapple Cake (2 pcs)
menu.desc: Traditional Taiwanese pastry, house pineapple jam

menu.name: Taro Ball Dessert Bowl
menu.desc: Purple taro, grass jelly, red bean, crushed ice

reviews.name: Sophie L.
reviews.text: A peaceful stop on a busy Dihua St walk. The oolong tea is exceptional. Loved the traditional atmosphere.

reviews.name: Chen W.
reviews.text: Great place to rest and try traditional snacks. The pineapple cakes are the real thing, not the tourist version.

name: Old Taipei Street Stalls
cuisine_zh: 街頭小吃 · 傳統點心 · 台灣料理

menu.name: Taiwanese Rice Roll (飯糰)
menu.desc: Glutinous rice, you tiao, pickled mustard, floss

menu.name: Peanut Mochi
menu.desc: Soft rice cake, crushed peanut sugar, fresh made

menu.name: Scallion Pancake
menu.desc: Crispy layers, fresh scallion, sesame

menu.name: Grass Jelly Drink
menu.desc: Cold black herbal jelly, brown sugar, ice

reviews.name: Tanya V.
reviews.text: Wandered into this area by accident and found the best snacks in Taipei. The rice rolls are incredible.

reviews.name: Jun L.
reviews.text: Authentic old Taipei street food. The scallion pancakes are crispy and fresh, just like grandma used to make.

name: Ay-Chung Flour-Rice Noodle
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 蚵仔麵線 · 街頭小吃

menu.name: Oyster Vermicelli (蚵仔麵線)
menu.desc: Oysters, intestine, thick noodles in starch broth

menu.name: Oyster Only Vermicelli
menu.desc: Extra oysters, no intestine, classic broth

menu.name: Large Bowl
menu.desc: Double portion, same great recipe

reviews.name: Ben K.
reviews.text: An institution. Been serving the same recipe for decades. Eat standing up on the street like everyone else.

reviews.name: Mei L.
reviews.text: The queue moves fast. Best oyster noodles in the city. NT$60 for something this good is unreal.

reviews.name: Pablo G.
reviews.text: Strange concept for a European but absolutely delicious. The broth is thick and savoury. Loved it.

name: Longshan Temple Rice Congee
cuisine_zh: 台式早餐 · 稀飯 · 傳統

menu.name: White Congee Set
menu.desc: Smooth rice porridge, 8 side dishes to share

menu.name: Preserved Egg & Pork Congee
menu.desc: Century egg, minced pork, ginger, scallion

menu.name: Salted Fish Congee
menu.desc: Dried salted fish, fresh ginger, white pepper

menu.name: Pickled Vegetable Side Dish
menu.desc: Assorted fermented vegetables, clean and tangy

reviews.name: Helen C.
reviews.text: A proper old Taipei breakfast experience. The congee is silky and comforting. Go early, it gets crowded.

reviews.name: Marco B.
reviews.text: Not what I expected but I loved it. The side dishes are fascinating — all pickled or braised. Very unique.

name: Bopiliao Handmade Dumplings
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 手工水餃 · 自製
address: Near Bopiliao Historic Block, Wanhua, Taipei

menu.name: Pork & Cabbage Dumplings (10 pcs)
menu.desc: Hand-wrapped, boiled, thin skin, juicy filling

menu.name: Chive & Egg Dumplings (10 pcs)
menu.desc: Fragrant chive, scrambled egg, vegetarian

menu.name: Dumpling Soup
menu.desc: Wontons in light pork broth, scallion, sesame oil

menu.name: House Chili Oil
menu.desc: Homemade, Sichuan peppercorn, garlic — dipping sauce

reviews.name: Cheng W.
reviews.text: The skins are made fresh every morning. You can taste the difference. Best dumplings near Wanhua.

reviews.name: Lena R.
reviews.text: Stumbled upon this while exploring Bopiliao and it was a revelation. Simple, honest, delicious dumplings.

name: Ximen Crispy Pork Chop
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 豬排 · 街頭小吃

menu.name: Classic Crispy Pork Chop
menu.desc: Marinated pork, crispy batter, served with rice and egg

menu.name: Spicy Chicken Cutlet
menu.desc: Boneless chicken thigh, basil, crispy skin, chili salt

menu.name: Pork Chop Rice Set
menu.desc: Chop + steamed rice + pickled veg + soup

menu.name: Sugarcane Juice
menu.desc: Fresh pressed, cold, no added sugar

reviews.name: Zach H.
reviews.text: The crispy pork chop here is unreal. Juicy inside, shatteringly crispy outside. Best street food in Ximending.

reviews.name: Amy C.
reviews.text: The spicy chicken is addictive. Huge portions for the price. Always a queue but moves quickly.

name: West Gate Teppanyaki
cuisine_zh: 日式融合 · 鐵板燒 · 套餐

menu.name: Beef Fillet Teppanyaki Set
menu.desc: 200g fillet, garlic butter, seasonal veg, rice or bread

menu.name: Prawn Teppanyaki Set
menu.desc: Tiger prawns, lemon butter, garlic chips, salad

menu.name: Mushroom & Tofu Vegetarian Set
menu.desc: Mixed mushrooms, firm tofu, teriyaki glaze

menu.name: Grilled Banana with Ice Cream
menu.desc: Caramelised banana, vanilla ice cream, honey drizzle

reviews.name: Laura G.
reviews.text: Great fun watching the chef cook in front of you. The beef fillet is tender and the garlic butter is incredible.

reviews.name: Kevin L.
reviews.text: Perfect date night spot. The show cooking is entertaining and the food is genuinely good. Good value.

name: Raohe Night Market
cuisine_zh: 街頭小吃 · 胡椒餅 · 台灣料理

menu.name: Fuzhou Pepper Bun (胡椒餅)
menu.desc: Baked dough, pork & scallion filling, black pepper

menu.name: Grilled Corn
menu.desc: Charcoal grilled, soy butter glaze

menu.name: Grilled Squid
menu.desc: Whole squid, sweet soy marinade, chili

menu.name: Fresh Sugar Cane Juice
menu.desc: Cold-pressed fresh cane, no added sugar

reviews.name: Liam O.
reviews.text: The pepper buns from the temple entrance stall are incredible. Queue is long but moves fast. Go at dusk.

reviews.name: Yoshi N.
reviews.text: More local than Shilin. Better food, friendlier atmosphere. The squid is superb.

reviews.name: Carmen V.
reviews.text: Night markets are a highlight of Taipei. Raohe has the best pepper buns anywhere. Come hungry.

name: Fujin Tree 353
cuisine_zh: 現代咖啡廳 · 早午餐 · 季節菜單

menu.name: Eggs Benedict
menu.desc: Sourdough, poached eggs, hollandaise, smoked salmon

menu.name: Seasonal Salad Bowl
menu.desc: Market veg, house dressing, nuts, soft-boiled egg

menu.name: Cold Brew Coffee
menu.desc: 18-hour cold brew, single origin, served over ice

menu.name: Croissant & Jam
menu.desc: Flaky butter croissant, house seasonal jam

reviews.name: Maya T.
reviews.text: The most beautiful café street in Taipei. Great food, great coffee. Go on a weekday morning if you can.

reviews.name: Julia K.
reviews.text: Lovely neighbourhood café vibe. The eggs benedict are perfect and the coffee is exceptional.

name: Alleycat's Pizza
cuisine_zh: 義大利料理 · 披薩 · 輕鬆

menu.name: Margherita (12 inch)
menu.desc: San Marzano tomato, buffalo mozzarella, fresh basil

menu.name: Truffle Mushroom (12 inch)
menu.desc: White truffle oil, mixed mushrooms, fontina, arugula

menu.name: Burrata & Tomato
menu.desc: Fresh burrata, heirloom tomato, olive oil, sea salt

menu.name: Craft Beer
menu.desc: Rotating local and imported craft beers on tap

reviews.name: Roberto M.
reviews.text: I'm Italian and I'm saying this is genuinely good pizza. The dough has the right chew. Impressed.

reviews.name: Sam J.
reviews.text: Best pizza in Taipei, full stop. The truffle mushroom is outstanding. Great spot for groups.

name: Kura Revolving Sushi
cuisine_zh: 日本料理 · 迴轉壽司 · 趣味

menu.name: Salmon Aburi Nigiri (2 pcs)
menu.desc: Torched salmon, ponzu, mayo

menu.name: Ebi Tempura Roll
menu.desc: Crispy prawn, cucumber, spicy mayo

menu.name: Miso Ramen
menu.desc: Rich miso broth, chashu, corn, soft egg

menu.name: Matcha Panna Cotta
menu.desc: Uji matcha, smooth set cream, red bean

reviews.name: Fiona L.
reviews.text: Great fun for kids and adults. The gamified plate collection is addictive. Very fresh fish.

reviews.name: Taro S.
reviews.text: Solid quality for the price. The aburi salmon is the highlight. Good weekend option with the family.

name: Han's Braised Pork Rice
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 魯肉飯 · 家常菜
address: 55 Nanjing E Rd, Sec 5, Songshan, Taipei

menu.name: Braised Pork Rice (魯肉飯)
menu.desc: Minced pork belly, sweet soy glaze, steamed rice, pickled veg

menu.name: Braised Pork Rice + Soft Egg
menu.desc: Same bowl with a perfectly braised egg

menu.name: Pork Offal Soup
menu.desc: Intestine, liver, ginger, sesame oil broth

menu.name: Stir-Fried Seasonal Greens
menu.desc: Garlic, oyster sauce, high-heat wok

reviews.name: Chen M.
reviews.text: The best lu rou fan in Songshan. The ratio of fat to lean is perfect. The egg is always exactly right.

reviews.name: Hannah W.
reviews.text: This is what comfort food looks like in Taiwan. NT$70 for one of the most satisfying bowls of food I've ever had.

name: Shilin Night Market
cuisine_zh: 街頭小吃 · 台灣料理 · 夜市

menu.name: XXL Crispy Chicken Cutlet
menu.desc: Huge boneless chicken, basil, chili powder, fried crispy

menu.name: Oyster Omelette (蚵仔煎)
menu.desc: Pan-fried oysters, egg, sweet potato starch, spicy sauce

menu.name: Stinky Tofu (臭豆腐)
menu.desc: Fermented tofu, fried crispy, pickled cabbage

menu.name: Grilled Sausage Wrapped in Sticky Rice
menu.desc: Pork sausage in glutinous rice casing, garlic, basil

reviews.name: Jake M.
reviews.text: The quintessential Taipei night market experience. Go at 8pm when it's in full swing. Overwhelming in the best way.

reviews.name: Marie C.
reviews.text: Very touristy but still great fun. The oyster omelette stall near the entrance is exceptional.

reviews.name: Kim S.
reviews.text: Bigger and more varied than any night market in Seoul. The XXL chicken is legendary. Go hungry.

name: Tian Ji Oyster Noodle
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 蚵仔麵線 · 在地愛店

menu.name: Oyster Vermicelli (Regular)
menu.desc: Oysters, sweet starch broth, house chili sauce

menu.name: Oyster Vermicelli (Large)
menu.desc: Extra oysters, bigger bowl

menu.name: Fried Shrimp Rolls
menu.desc: Shrimp paste, crispy wrappers, tangy dipping sauce

menu.name: Winter Melon Tea
menu.desc: Cold brewed winter melon, lightly sweet

reviews.name: Yen C.
reviews.text: The locals' choice away from the tourist stalls. The broth is thicker and richer here than at Shilin Market.

reviews.name: George T.
reviews.text: Recommended by our Airbnb host. Glad we found it. Much better than the night market versions.

name: House of Stinky Tofu
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 臭豆腐 · 酥炸
address: Near Shilin Night Market, Shilin, Taipei

menu.name: Fried Stinky Tofu (4 pcs)
menu.desc: Deep fried, crispy outside, silky inside, pickled cabbage

menu.name: Spicy Mala Stinky Tofu Hot Pot
menu.desc: Boiled version in spicy broth, mushrooms, tofu

menu.name: Oyster Omelette
menu.desc: Pan-fried oysters, egg, starch base, sweet chili sauce

menu.name: Plum Juice
menu.desc: Cold brewed sour plum, cooling, traditional

reviews.name: Dan T.
reviews.text: I was terrified and then completely converted. The smell is part of the experience. Incredibly good.

reviews.name: Linh N.
reviews.text: Better than the version back home. The fried one is phenomenal with the pickled cabbage. Life-changing.

name: Grand Café Shilin
cuisine_zh: 咖啡廳 · 早午餐 · 輕食

menu.name: Latte Art
menu.desc: Double espresso, steamed oat milk, seasonal latte art

menu.name: Club Sandwich
menu.desc: Toasted white, chicken, bacon, egg, tomato, lettuce, mayo

menu.name: Yuzu Cheesecake Slice
menu.desc: Japanese yuzu, light cream cheese, biscuit base

menu.name: Açaí Bowl
menu.desc: Blended açaí, granola, banana, honey, fresh fruit

reviews.name: Sarah H.
reviews.text: A comfortable café in an unexpected part of Shilin. Great for working or resting after the night market.

reviews.name: Wendy L.
reviews.text: My neighbourhood café. The yuzu cheesecake is the best I've had in Taipei. Staff are always friendly.

name: Ji Pai Chicken Cutlet
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 雞排 · 街頭小吃

menu.name: Original Crispy Chicken Cutlet
menu.desc: Whole boneless thigh, fried to order, chili or original

menu.name: Basil Chicken Cutlet
menu.desc: Same cutlet with crispy basil leaves, aromatic and crunchy

menu.name: Combo: Chicken + Drink
menu.desc: Cutlet with your choice of house drink

menu.name: Crispy Fries
menu.desc: Seasoned with sea salt and pepper, served hot

reviews.name: Paul L.
reviews.text: The basil chicken cutlet converted me. I thought it would be oily but the frying is perfect — light, crispy, juicy.

reviews.name: Amy T.
reviews.text: The best chicken cutlet near Shilin. Bigger than the night market version and better quality. Always fresh.

name: Yonghe Soy Milk
cuisine_zh: 台式早餐 · 豆漿 · 24小時

menu.name: Warm Fresh Soy Milk
menu.desc: Classic unsweetened or lightly sweet

menu.name: Shaobing You Tiao
menu.desc: Sesame flatbread with crispy fried dough inside

menu.name: Dan Bing (Egg & Scallion Crepe)
menu.desc: Soft egg crepe, scallion, soy drizzle

menu.name: Fan Tuan (Rice Roll)
menu.desc: Glutinous rice, you tiao, pork floss, pickled mustard

reviews.name: Ryan C.
reviews.text: I had breakfast here at 6am every single day. The best way to start a morning in Taipei. Everything is perfect.

reviews.name: Sora T.
reviews.text: Open 24 hours means perfect 3am snacks after the bars. The soy milk is warm and comforting. Iconic Taipei.

reviews.name: Hana L.
reviews.text: Very authentic Taiwanese breakfast. The rice roll is my favourite — filling, savoury and good value.

name: Gongguan Night Market
cuisine_zh: 街頭小吃 · 學生美食 · 台灣料理

menu.name: Salt & Pepper Mushrooms
menu.desc: King oyster mushrooms, basil, chili, crispy fried

menu.name: Grilled Squid on Stick
menu.desc: Whole squid, charcoal grilled, soy glaze

menu.name: Deep-Fried Taro Balls
menu.desc: Crispy shell, soft taro inside, pair of two

menu.name: Passion Fruit Juice
menu.desc: Fresh passion fruit, cold pressed, sweetened

reviews.name: Laura T.
reviews.text: Much more authentic than Shilin. Students eating alongside tourists makes it feel real. Great food, great energy.

reviews.name: Victor C.
reviews.text: Located near NTU so the atmosphere is young and lively. The mushrooms and squid are unmissable.

name: Fu Hang Soy Milk
cuisine: Taiwanese Breakfast · Flaky Flatbreads · Soy Milk
cuisine_zh: 台式早餐 · 厚燒餅 · 豆漿
address: 108 Zhongxiao E Rd, Sec 1, 2F, Zhongzheng, Taipei
mrt: Shan Hua Rd Station · Exit 3 · 2 min walk

menu.name: Thick Shaobing (Sesame Flatbread)
menu.desc: Flaky, layered, sesame-topped, baked fresh every 20 min

menu.name: Shaobing with Egg & Ham
menu.desc: Flatbread stuffed with scrambled egg and ham

menu.name: Soy Milk (Warm)
menu.desc: Pure, fresh ground, cooked in house, slightly nutty

menu.name: You Tiao (Double-fried)
menu.desc: Exceptionally airy and crispy dough stick

reviews.name: Tina W.
reviews.text: I queued 35 minutes and I'd do it again. The shaobing is the best I've ever tasted — layers of crispy perfection.

reviews.name: Hiro K.
reviews.text: Worth every second of the queue. The soy milk is silky and the flatbreads are extraordinary. Pure Taipei.

reviews.name: Anne G.
reviews.text: The line at 6am is a sight to behold. But what comes out of that kitchen is worth it completely.

name: Zhongzheng Beef Noodle
cuisine_zh: 台灣料理 · 牛肉麵 · 街坊老店
address: 45 Jinshan S Rd, Sec 1, Zhongzheng, Taipei
mrt: Chiang Kai-shek Memorial · Exit 4 · 8 min walk

menu.name: Braised Beef Noodle
menu.desc: Deep red broth, brisket and tendon, hand-pulled noodles

menu.name: Spicy Beef Noodle
menu.desc: Same broth with added chili paste and garlic oil

menu.name: Scallion Pancake
menu.desc: Pan-fried, sesame, crispy layers

menu.name: Bamboo Shoot Salad
menu.desc: Cold, sesame dressing, refreshing side

reviews.name: Chou F.
reviews.text: My local beef noodle place for 10 years. Consistent, delicious, no gimmicks. The braised tendon is phenomenal.

reviews.name: Ian D.
reviews.text: A local favourite away from the tourist trail. The broth is deep and warming. Perfect rainy day lunch.

name: Liberty Square Café
cuisine_zh: 咖啡廳 · 輕食 · 歷史場景
mrt: Chiang Kai-shek Memorial · Exit 2 · 3 min walk

menu.name: Taiwanese Single Origin Coffee
menu.desc: Alishan grown beans, pour over, light roast

menu.name: Garden Salad Set
menu.desc: Local vegetables, yuzu dressing, sourdough bread

menu.name: Pineapple Cake Waffle
menu.desc: Crispy waffle, pineapple jam, fresh cream

menu.name: Oolong Milk Tea
menu.desc: High mountain oolong, warm oat milk, no sugar

reviews.name: Patricia H.
reviews.text: Perfect place to rest after visiting the CKS Memorial. The coffee is excellent and the garden view is beautiful.

reviews.name: Thomas M.
reviews.text: Peaceful café in a historic area. The pineapple waffle is a clever tribute to the region's famous pastry.
